nasb.text: but sought the God of his father, followed His commandments, and did not act as Israel did.

esv.text: but sought the God of his father and walked in his commandments, and not according to the practices of Israel.

cnv.text: 只尋求他父親的　神，遵行　神的誡命，沒有隨從以色列人的行為。

ccb.text: 只寻求他父亲的上帝，遵行祂的诫命，没有效法以色列人的行为。
